title: Opensuse openbuild ubuntu + buildah packages
body: Move installation of packages necessary for buildah CI, here so the projects can both re-use the same VM images.  Make some other minor improvements along with switching to using the Opensuse openbuild Ubuntu packages instead of the (now) unmaintained projectatomic PPA.

comments.body: @TomSweeneyRedHat FYI- this PR is waiting on https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/criu/issues/973
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #5532) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.

@baude this PR brings in the new VM images w/ conmon update + moves our Ubuntu VM images off of the old PPA stuff and onto OpenSuse OBS.  There are a few tests failing which I'm not sure how to debug, would you mind taking a look when you have a moment:  https://cirrus-ci.com/build/4842660733124608

@lsm5 when u have a moment, PTAL see if any of these test errors seem familiar (it's okay if not)?
https://cirrus-ci.com/build/4842660733124608
Rebased and force-pushed.  Prior runs were missing some commits.  Let's see what happens now...
@baude @mheon okay, I think this is ready now.  PTAL when you have a moment, it's not urgent.
(FWIW: I needed to re-run two flaking tasks, noticed problems in 'search' and 'login/logout' tests on both)
